## Summary

Implements the full AI generation pipeline for all 6 Agent Readiness submission sections. Previously, Generate/Regenerate/Improve buttons were decorative-only with no backend. Now they call OpenAI via `POST /api/agent-readiness/generate`, apply quality gates, and populate the textarea with submission-grade content.

## Scope

**Touched:**
- `app/api/agent-readiness/generate/route.ts` — new API route
- `app/agent-readiness/hooks/useAgentReadinessGenerate.ts` — shared generation hook
- `app/agent-readiness/components/SectionActionRow.tsx` — shared button row
- `app/agent-readiness/query-letter/page.tsx` — wired Generate/Regenerate/Improve
- `app/agent-readiness/synopsis/page.tsx` — wired generation
- `app/agent-readiness/pitch/page.tsx` — wired generation
- `app/agent-readiness/comparables/page.tsx` — wired generation
- `app/agent-readiness/bio/page.tsx` — replaced hardcoded static bio with real generation
- `app/agent-readiness/PackageSectionsSidebar.tsx` — preserve query params across nav

**Out of scope:** Evaluation pipeline, revision queue, download routes, existing tests.

## Tests Updated

No new test files — this is a frontend feature + API route. Quality gates are inline in the route. The route's quality gate rejects contaminated output before returning to the user.

## Visual Evidence

N/A — UI buttons existed already; this change makes them functional.

## Accessibility

N/A — existing buttons unchanged structurally; added `disabled` states for proper keyboard/screen-reader behavior.

## Browser Targets

N/A — standard Next.js client components.

## CI/Infra Scope

N/A — no CI/infra changes.

## Rollback Plan

Revert commit. Buttons return to decorative-only state.

## Affected Workflows

N/A — new feature, no existing workflow changes.

## Schema Diff

N/A — uses `agent_readiness_sections` table for optional persistence (upsert, non-blocking).

N/A

N/A

N/A

## Data Backfill Risk

N/A

## RLS / Access Impact

API route uses `getAuthenticatedUser()` — requires valid session. Admin client used only for data reads.

## Production Verification Query

N/A

## Unauthorized Input Sources

- User provides `manuscriptId`, `evaluationJobId`, `section`, `mode` via authenticated POST
- Route validates all inputs, rejects invalid section types
- OpenAI output goes through quality gate before returning to user

## Internal Process Leakage

No internal process details exposed. System prompts are server-side only.

## Input → Action → Output

User clicks Generate → `POST /api/agent-readiness/generate` with manuscript context → OpenAI generates section → quality gate validates → content returned to textarea.

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

N/A — no metrics exposed.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

New API route adds one serverless function. No evaluation pipeline changes.

## Latency Impact

New endpoint only — does not affect existing evaluation or download latency. Generation calls OpenAI with 45s timeout, 2-attempt retry.

Process Change: no

## Contract Integrity

N/A — no evaluation contracts modified.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

Quality gates enforce: no editorial meta-language (12 patterns), no placeholder text (9 patterns), word-limit compliance per section.

## Latency Evidence

N/A — not an evaluation-path change.

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_none — not an evaluation-path change.

## Risk

Low — new feature only. No modification to evaluation pipeline, downloads, or existing functionality. Buttons that previously did nothing now call an API.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- If `OPENAI_API_KEY` env var not set, route returns 500 with clear error message
- `agent_readiness_sections` table may not exist yet in all environments (persistence is non-blocking — generation still works)
- Author Bio requires author-supplied materials; returns 422 with `needsInput: true` if none provided

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: This PR adds a new isolated feature (Agent Readiness generation). Zero impact on evaluation pipeline, revision queue, or download routes.
